title: Eriosyce atroviridis
taxonomy: Eriosyce atroviridis belongs to the family Cactaceae, specifically the subfamily Cactoideae. It is a genus of cacti, and Eriosyce is a part of this larger group of plants. The classification of Eriosyce atroviridis is further divided into the tribe Cacteae. This plant is native to South America and is a part of the broader plant kingdom classification, with its scientific name being Eriosyce atroviridis. The classification of Eriosyce atroviridis is also known as Eriosyce, a classification that is also commonly referred to as Copiapoa.
uses: Eriosyce atroviridis is a species of cactus that has been used in traditional medicine in its native region.
